privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated drafts injected into the Maildir via setup_task.sh. The target proposal draft is addressed to 'client.relations@strategic-partners.com', and the agent is expected to append the string 'initial draft of the Q3 report for your review'. The stale draft to be deleted has the subject 'Taco Tuesday?', and the draft to be preserved has the subject 'Invoice #9928 Query'. All these parameters correctly match the explicit instructions, setup scripts, and the verifier.py logic.
